message:
refactor(messaging): gate fabric module behind messaging-fabric feature flag

The fabric module was previously unconditionally compiled. Now it is
gated behind the messaging-fabric Cargo feature with a placeholder
namespace module when the feature is inactive. This keeps explicit
opt-in builds green while the real FABRIC surface implementation is
developed behind this feature boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
